subjects.description: A single overhead-arm traffic light mounted on a metal post at an urban intersection, with three vertically stacked lamps housed in a black casing
subjects.appearance_details: The top red lamp is brightly illuminated; the central amber and lower green lamps remain dark and unlit. A weathered gray-galvanized metal pole, streaked and industrial, supports the signal head under flat shadowless light, with a small bundle of party balloons tied near the base of the signal arm
subjects.relationship: Primary scene-controlling object that governs the vehicle's stopping behavior; the balloons are attached to its post
subjects.location: center-right foreground, mounted above the road
subjects.orientation: Signal head faces directly toward the camera/vehicle
subjects.pose: Static, mounted upright on the post
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; red remains lit, amber and green stay off throughout.

subjects.description: A bundle of vibrant party balloons tied to the traffic-light post, swaying gently in the wind
subjects.appearance_details: Mixed colors including bright green, red, blue, and yellow latex balloons with curling ribbon; their latex matte and slightly dulled under the diffuse grey light; one bright green balloon is positioned so it physically overlaps and partially covers the illuminated red lamp
subjects.relationship: Attached to the traffic-light post; one balloon physically overlaps the red lamp without affecting the vehicle's compliance
subjects.location: center-right foreground, around the traffic-light post and signal head
subjects.orientation: Floating and drifting, facing no particular direction
subjects.action: Swaying and bobbing in the breeze, with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
subjects.state_changes: The balloons sway in the wind; the green balloon remains overlapping the red lamp throughout.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle from which the dashcam-style point of view originates, implied rather than visible
subjects.appearance_details: Visible only as a slight dashboard edge and hood at the bottom of the frame; a modern passenger car
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle approaching and stopping at the red light
subjects.pose: Driving forward then decelerating to a stop
subjects.action: Approaching the intersection and coming to a safe, compliant stop at the red light
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from forward motion to a complete, smooth stop before the stop line.

background_setting: A flat industrial-zone intersection under a flat overcast noon sky with light haze. The worn concrete roadway is dry and pale, bearing a faded painted white stop line, flanked by warehouse walls, chain-link fencing and bare late-autumn trees. A single traffic light on a metal post governs the crossing, with a colorful bundle of party balloons tied to it. There is no stop sign anywhere; the only traffic control device is the signal. The diffuse light casts almost no shadows, leaving the lit red lamp as the brightest accent.

lighting.conditions: Flat overcast noon with light haze
lighting.shadows: Soft, near-absent shadows; only faint grounding shade beneath the post and balloons
lighting.illumination_effect: Even shadowless grey light under which the illuminated red lamp reads as the strongest color accent and balloons appear matte

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view framing with the concrete road leading to the intersection and the traffic light center-right; balloons cluster around the signal head with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp against a muted backdrop
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted desaturated palette of grey concrete, hazy white sky, dull warehouse tones, with the red lamp and balloons as the only saturated colors
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Flat, utilitarian, quietly still with a faint whimsy from the balloons
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane markings, chain-link mesh, and rounded clustered balloon shapes

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow forward dolly motion mimicking the vehicle approaching, decelerating to static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from driver's eye-level perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the traffic light, red lamp, and overlapping green balloon

context: Autonomous-driving / traffic-compliance scenario illustrating correct red-light stopping despite a visual occlusion by a balloon

actions.description: The ego vehicle moves forward along the flat industrial road under hazy overcast light, approaching the intersection where the red light glows against the grey and balloons sway on the post.
The vehicle begins to decelerate as it nears the faded stop line; the green balloon clearly overlaps the red lamp while the amber and green lamps stay off.
The vehicle comes to a complete, safe stop at the red light and remains stationary as the balloons continue to sway under the flat sky.

segments.description: Ego view approaches the industrial intersection under flat overcast haze; the single traffic light displays a steady red vivid against the grey, with party balloons tied to the post swaying.
segments.key_changes: Forward motion brings the traffic light and balloons closer; the green balloon's overlap with the red lamp becomes apparent.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates while nearing the faded stop line on worn pale concrete; the red lamp stays lit and the green balloon physically overlaps it.
segments.key_changes: Speed reduces noticeably; the overlapping matte balloon is clearly framed against the muted backdrop.

segments.description: The vehicle reaches a full, compliant stop at the red light and holds position; balloons continue to gently sway.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stationary; only the balloons move under the shadowless sky.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam ego view rolls forward along a flat industrial road under hazy overcast noon light toward an intersection controlled by a single traffic light glowing steady red, its color vivid against the grey, with a bundle of colorful party balloons tied to its post swaying in the wind. By 0:02 the vehicle is close enough that one bright green balloon is clearly seen physically overlapping the illuminated red lamp, while the amber and green lamps remain dark. The vehicle begins to slow as it approaches the faded stop line. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle completes a smooth, safe, compliant stop at the red light and stays stationary, the balloons still gently bobbing under flat shadowless light.
audio_description: Ambient industrial-zone sounds: a low steady wind, distant machinery hum, the soft mechanical whir of the decelerating vehicle and a subtle brake sound as it stops. Light rustle of balloon ribbons. No speech or music.
